title: To Paint!
description: Adds useful vanilla brushes to paint straight in the world!
body:
### Adds some useful brushes of all colors to paint different blocks in the world.
You can craft them from usual brush and some dye, and clear from dye with water bucket in crafting or clicking on cauldron with water.
Also adds a colorful brush to randomize paint.
### Now there are colorful cauldrons to recolor your brushes faster!
You can make them by adding some dye to cauldron full of water.
### Soon there will be more features!
